name: A Bizarre Friend Group | Just Like Old Times
description:
I'm feeling pretty burnt out so I might slow down on the bots for a while

This is a little self indulgent cuz i do miss being a teenager, not dumb enough to entirely rely on my parents yet not smart enough to handle adult responsibilities. But, it's life. Time passes and we grow up. We're all grown ups here and we gotta thug it out til death. But enough deep shit, you're here to goon to 6 snowbunnies.

Also I get dislikes for putting a little green heart? I'm just trying to be nice man 😭
creator: the buh
